verification_conclusion.summary: MindSpeed-LLM Python package can be installed on x86_64 Ubuntu 24.04 with architecture-specific modifications. However, full functionality requires Ascend NPU hardware and aarch64 architecture. The package structure is valid and core dependencies install correctly.
recommendations: Use aarch64 architecture with actual Ascend NPU hardware for full functionality
Consider using the Dockerfile provided in the repository which is configured for NPU environments
On aarch64 with NPU, all components including torch_npu and triton-ascend should work
